pokemon:celesteela.name: Celesteela
pokemon:celesteela.summary: One kind of Ultra Beast. Witnesses have seen it burn down a forest by expelling gas from its two arms.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: One kind of Ultra Beast. Witnesses have seen it burn down a forest by expelling gas from its two arms.
It appeared from the Ultra Wormhole. Witnesses observed it flying across the sky at high speed.
Although it’s alien to this world and a danger here, it’s apparently a common organism in the world where it normally lives.
One of the dangerous UBs, high energy readings can be detected coming from both of its huge arms.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: One kind of Ultra Beast. Witnesses have seen it burn down a forest by expelling gas from its two arms.

form:celesteela.name: Celesteela
form:celesteela.summary: Celesteela form with Steel / Flying typing.
